failures.description: The agent fabricated an item ID and price that were not grounded in the catalog search result, instead of answering with item 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle from ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The search at index 3 returned sorted available items, with the cheapest item being 1240311797 priced at 137.17. At index 4, the Executor claimed item 0000000000 was cheapest at $0.01, but neither that item nor that price appears anywhere in the available tool output. The agent used this unsupported invented value as the final answer. The error was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 incorrectly approved the fabricated answer.
